meaning: vt.再充电,再控告,再袭击vi.再袭击n.再袭击,再装填
examples: The drill takes about three hours to recharge.
To be sure, the battery still has a long way to go before the nightly recharge completely replaces the weekly trip to the gas station.
He plugged his razor in to recharge it.
Laughs and breathers from work can actively help employees recharge and return to their computers energized.
However battery life of controllers is subject to how you recharge, (frequency and levels).
